prompts.message: Enter the name of an animal
Enter a word describing how something happens

stories.title: The Worst Vacation Ever
storyTemplate: Yesterday, {person} decided to visit {place} with a pet {animal}.
Everything was going well until the {animal} suddenly {verb1} onto a giant {object}.
Everyone watched {adverb} as {person} tried to {verb2} while holding a {food}.
It was the most {adjective1} and {adjective2} vacation ever.

stories.title: Cooking Disaster
storyTemplate: Chef {person} proudly announced today's special:
A grilled {animal} stuffed with {food}.
Unfortunately, someone accidentally {verb1} the {object}, causing everyone to {verb2}.

stories.title: School Presentation
storyTemplate: Today, {person} gave a presentation about the amazing {animal}.
According to the report, the creature lives inside {place} and enjoys eating {food} every morning.
To prove it, {person} began to {verb1} with a giant {object}, then {verb2} around the classroom {adverb}.
The teacher called it both {adjective1} and {adjective2}.

stories.title: Breaking News
storyTemplate: Breaking News!
A {animal} has taken control of {place}.

Mayor {person} responded by trying to {verb2}, but everything happened too {adverb}.

stories.title: The Weird Job Interview
storyTemplate: During an interview at {place}, {person} was asked one simple question:
"Can you {verb1} a {animal} while carrying a {object}?"
After answering yes, they immediately had to {verb2} while balancing a plate of {food}.
The interviewer watched {adverb} before saying,
"That was the most {adjective1} and {adjective2} performance we've ever seen."
Needless to say, {person} got the job.
